title: Bridge Essay: Nonlinear brain correlates of trait self-boundarylessness.
concept: Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

**Nonlinear brain correlates of trait self-boundarylessness.** - Neurosci Conscious (2023). DOI: 10.1093/nc/niad006. PMID: 37114163. Alterations of the sense of self induced by meditation include an increased sense of boundarylessness. In this study, we investigated behavioural and functional magnetic resonance imaging correlates of trait self-boundarylessness during resting state and the performance of two experimental tasks. We found that boundarylessness correlated with greater self-endorsement of words related to fluidity and with longer response times in a math task.
